---
title: "Homework 7"
author: "Kunaal Raghav"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Package Download

The following r chunk includes the packages we will use for homework assignment

```{r}
library(ISLR2)
library(car)
```

## College Applications

Prior to addressing any of the homework assignments, I will be including the training/testing split that the homework requires

```{r}
data("College")

my.college <- College[-484, ] 

my.college <- College[College$Apps <=16000, ] 

train.pct <- 0.78

set.seed(2025)

Z <- sample(nrow(my.college), floor(train.pct*nrow(my.college)))

college.data <- my.college[Z, ]

holdout.data <- my.college[-Z, ]
```

Part A

```{r}


# Fit full model
fit_full <- lm(Outstate ~ ., data = college.data)

# Compute VIF
vif_values <- vif(fit_full)
vif_values

```

Several of the coefficients, such as Apps, Accept, Enroll, and PHD seem to have high colliniarity
